hero.title: Eva Montes
hero.lead: A delicate, intense and elegant artistic project with a contemporary identity.

biography.title: Early Talent
biography.description: Eva Montes began her musical training at the age of 6 with the violin, showing outstanding talent from a very early age. At 11, she started composing her own pieces. Her interpretative ability stands out both on violin and piano, establishing her as a young musician of great versatility. Throughout her career she has been part of prestigious orchestral ensembles such as the Jove Orquestra de Ponent, the Orquestra Julià Carbonell, the Orquestra Simfònica Juvenil de Catalunya and the Orquestra En Clave de Arts, experiences that have contributed to her artistic and stage development. In the creative field, she has been recognised for three consecutive years with the composition prize in the Liceu Young Creators Competition, consolidating her profile as an emerging author. In 2025, her talent as a singer-songwriter was also recognised nationally after receiving the Mil Descobreix award in Xàtiva. In addition to her instrumental and compositional work, she has stage experience performing her own songs and exploring a wide variety of styles including pop, rock, jazz and lyrical music, reflecting her artistic sensitivity and adaptability.

1.title: Piano Award “Maestro Alonso” Julio 2024 en Segovia

2.title: Awarded Joves Creadors Liceu tres años consecutivos 2024, 2025 y 2026
2.description: Participation and recognition in the young creators programme linked to the Liceu of Barcelona.

3.title: Third prize for her vocal performance in the competition “Joves Interprets Musicals” de Andorra 2026
3.description: Recognition obtained in the young musical performers competition in Andorra.

4.title: Honourable mention Sant Anastasi 2026 en canto
4.description: Honorary recognition in the specialty of lyrical singing.

5.title: First place in the Academica International Studies Song Competition 2026
5.description: International award for her composition and vocal performance.
